🎁 【2 Pcs Large Hole Sink Strainer】Particularly suitable for kitchen drainage, where water passes quickly and stops food flowing into the sink. The perfect gadget for the kitchen essential.

🎁 【Easy to Install and Replace】Simply place and use. For use in bathrooms (baths, tubs, bathroom drains etc.) Also for draining drains and collecting debris in kitchens etc. Prevents clogging of drains and the formation of unpleasant odours. Ideal for kitchens and bathrooms.
